---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

#                          ![](images/clipboard-1461095311.png)

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, TOBB ETU , 2021-2025

-   M.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2026 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Özben Savunma, Quality Control Engineer, 2024

2.  Bilişim A.Ş., Quality Management System Expert, 2025

## Internships

1.  Bozankaya A.Ş., Quality Control Engineer Intern, 2023

2.  Özben Savunma, Quality Control Engineer Intern, 2024

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, C, CPLEX

#
